title: calamagrostis tenella var. alpina
intro: Calamagrostis tenella var. alpina, also known as Alpine Fescue, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alpine Fescue include its ability to support respiratory health, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive issues. Alpine Fescue can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
